title: Heavy Duty 9" Garden Broom Head with Fitted Handle Bracket – Indoor Outdoor Long Stiff Bristles for Patio Driveway Caravan & Garage – Yellow Sweeping Floor Brush for Home Floors Kitchen & Office
features: Brush Heads Sweeping All Around Home - Everything you need from a kitchen broom. Long stiff bristle brush head with flagged ends attracts dust, dirt and hair, leaving flooring clean and tidy
Garden Broom Outdoor Heavy Duty – Featuring yellow flagged bristle, this broom indoor is ideal for sweeping leaves and grass cuttings in your garden, yards, decking, patio, garage, and driveways

Outdoor Kitchen Brush Cleans Every Corner - This indoor broom has an angled head which is perfect for getting into corners and under tables and chairs. Ideal for getting into all the narrow spaces ordinary brooms can't reach or may cause damage

Durable Broom Handle Bracket - The brush head fittings are made of sturdy plastic for tough patio brush support so that your stiff brush is ideal for all sweeping tasks. Fits Italian threaded broom handle brace of 22 mm (not supplied)

Specifications - The outdoor broom with broom bracket dimensions: 24 x 19.5 x 3.5 cm. The length of stiff brush bristles: 13.5 cm. Braid rows: 3 rows. Material composition: PVC, PET. Broom handles wooden are not supplied
description: Product Description Built Tough for Everyday Sweeping Built for Power: The Ultimate Heavy-Duty Broom Head Take on demanding cleaning tasks with confidence. This professional-grade 9” broom head is crafted for power and precision, built to sweep stubborn dirt, debris, and garden mess from patios, driveways, garages, and workshops. Whether for home or trade use, it delivers consistent performance you can rely on. Ideal for Home, Office, Kitchen & More Stiff Bristles That Sweep More, Last Longer Made with tightly packed, extra-rigid synthetic bristles, this floor brush clears both large debris like grass and leaves, and smaller particles such as sawdust, sand, and fine dust. Ideal for heavy-duty sweeping, yet gentle enough for use indoors without damaging surfaces—versatile, effective, and built to last. Universal Fit with Bracket Included Secure Fit with Reinforced Handle Bracket A durable integrated bracket provides a secure and wobble-free fit for most standard 22mm wooden handles (not supplied). Designed to withstand pressure and movement, the reinforced mount prevents cracking or loosening—ideal for high-impact sweeping without interruptions. Perfect for Every Space: Indoors and Out From artificial grass to tiled kitchens, this broom head adapts to any cleaning environment. Use it dry as a yard broom or wet as a decking scrubber. Whether you’re cleaning patios, conservatories, commercial kitchens, or caravans, it’s the one brush head for all jobs—saving space and time. Reliable Performance, Season After Season Weatherproof & Easy to Clean—Built to Endure Crafted from waterproof-coated wood, this outdoor brush head resists mould, moisture, and daily wear. After heavy use, just rinse with a garden hose—no special cleaning required. It’s a low-maintenance, high-performance tool made to handle the elements all year round.
